= public

Static assets served at the root of the application by Vite.
Files here are copied verbatim to `dist/` at build time and are not processed by the bundler.

== Contents

`tbox.ttl`::
SHACL TBox (Turtle format) downloaded from datashapes.org.
Used at runtime by the validation layer to look up type definitions and generate SHACL shapes.
*Do not edit by hand* — regenerate with:
+
----
node scripts/extract-tbox.mjs
----
